underlying_goal: Fix ESLint issue RECO-620 by refactoring a config file and updating all its callers/usages across the codebase
friction_detail: Claude's refactoring broke multiple test assertions because it changed function signatures to use object destructuring but didn't update all test mock expectations accordingly, requiring several rounds of test fixes.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix an ESLint issue by refactoring a config file and all its callers; Claude completed the refactoring but broke several tests in the process, requiring multiple fix iterations before all tests passed.
